description: Trousseau list in connection with a marriage document. Mentions Tinnisian cloth, Dabīqī linen, quantities of dinars, dyed wool, a menora, and an oil amphora. On verso (the witnesses) Joseph and Abū l-Faraj are mentioned. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
